author: lOrm
content: Phase 1 behavioral spec for workflow-control tools (Plan/Worktree, TodoWrite, Skill, Sleep, ScheduleCron, ToolSearch). The issue body already contains partial spec text (plan-mode enforcement section). Remaining tools need their contracts pinned down by reading CC TS source. Not addressable in this cleanup session: external-source research. Phase 2 implementations tracked under #574 (task_output), #580 (task_stop), #612 (skill as tool), #614 (tool_search deferred schema loading), #615 (sleep), #621 (CronCreate flags). Owner-level external research.
